_comment: Chipset reference data for catalog README generation. Add new entries when onboarding modems with unknown chipsets.

bcm3390.notes: Current flagship. 2x2 OFDM, 32x8 SC-QAM. Speeds exceeding 1 Gbps.

bcm3383.notes: Entry-level 8x4 chipset with integrated WiFi SoC.

bcm3380.notes: Legacy 8x4 chipset. First single-chip DOCSIS 3.0 solution (2009).

puma 5.notes: Legacy 8x4 chipset (TI TNETC4800). [Latency issues](https://www.theregister.com/2017/08/09/intel_puma_modem_woes/) less severe than Puma 6.

puma 6.notes: ⚠️ **Avoid.** [Hardware flaw](https://www.theregister.com/2017/04/11/intel_puma_6_arris/) causes latency spikes up to 250ms under load. No fix available.

puma 7.notes: ⚠️ **Avoid.** [Same architectural issues](https://www.theregister.com/2018/08/14/intel_puma_modem/) as Puma 6. Major vendors switched to Broadcom.
